mapper.select:
SELECT ct.*, d.device_name, d.device_code, b.branch_name, b.address as branch_address, co1.name as operator_a_name, co2.name as operator_b_name FROM cleaning_tasks ct LEFT JOIN devices d ON ct.device_id = d.id LEFT JOIN branches b ON d.branch_id = b.id LEFT JOIN cleaning_operators co1 ON ct.operator_a_id = co1.id LEFT JOIN cleaning_operators co2 ON ct.operator_b_id = co2.id WHERE ct.task_status = '待执行'
AND b.id = #{branchId}
AND (ct.operator_a_id = #{operatorId} OR ct.operator_b_id = #{operatorId})
ORDER BY ct.planned_start_time ASC
